name: Refactor
description: Safe refactoring workflow — behavior-preserving changes only

tasks.detail: Read all affected files. Note what each part does. Identify all callers/dependents.
Behavior-preserving changes only. Do not add features or fix bugs as part of refactor.

tasks.content: Verified behavior is unchanged after refactor
tasks.detail: Run the same scenarios as before. All outputs must match pre-refactor behavior.
